channel.title: Bug fix release: REST API - Head Tags plugin (version 1.1.3)
channel.description:
Hi all! :wave:
This new version of the the **REST API - Head Tags** includes a fix for a [bug](https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/issues/28) that was breaking the REST API in sites with the Yoast SEO plugin installed. It was causing redirections to images when the REST API response contained a media entity.
Remember that if you are using the **REST API - Head Tags** plugin, you should update it to the last version (using the update button in the WordPress admin panel or downloading it from [here](https://wordpress.org/plugins/rest-api-head-tags/)).
Feel free to ask if you need some help or have any questions. :blush:
## 1.1.3
### Patch Changes
- [`a46927b`](https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/commit/a46927bbde468157e85fe247b72ad44895ccf50d) [#29](https://github.com/frontity/wp-plugins/pull/29) - Fix redirects to images when making calls to the REST API in a site with Yoast installed. Also, refactor the code to prevent other redirections in the future.

item.title: Bug fix release: REST API - Head Tags plugin (version 1.1.3)
item.dc:creator: David
item.description:
Hi all!

This new version of the the REST API - Head Tags includes a fix for a bug that was breaking the REST API in sites with the Yoast SEO plugin installed. It was causing redirections to images when the REST API response contained a media entity.

Remember that if you are using the REST API - Head Tags plugin, you should update it to the last version (using the update button in the WordPress admin panel or downloading it from here).

Feel free to ask if you need some help or have any questions.

1.1.3

Patch Changes

  • a46927b #29 - Fix redirects to images when making calls to the REST API in a site with Yoast installed. Also, refactor the code to prevent other redirections in the future.

Read full topic
item.source: Bug fix release: REST API - Head Tags plugin (version 1.1.3)
